prompt_text: Front vs Help Scout pricing and features
response:
# Front vs Help Scout Comparison

## Pricing

| Feature | Front | Help Scout |
|---------|-------|-----------|
| **Free Plan** | Limited (1 user) | Yes (up to 3 users) |
| **Basic Paid** | $59/user/month | $20/user/month |
| **Mid-tier** | $99/user/month | $65/user/month |
| **Enterprise** | Custom | Custom |

## Key Features

### **Front**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Multi-channel inbox (email, SMS, chat, social)
- Powerful collaboration tools
- Strong automation & workflow builder
- AI-powered drafts & suggestions
- Advanced team management
- Better for high-volume/complex workflows

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Higher per-user costs
- Steeper learning curve
- Overkill for small teams

### **Help Scout**
✅ **Strengths:**
- Lower cost per user
- Simple, intuitive interface
- Solid knowledge base/documentation tools
- Email & chat focus
- Great for small-to-mid teams
- Faster implementation

❌ **Weaknesses:**
- Limited channel integrations
- Less advanced automation
- SMS support requires extra tools

## Quick Decision Guide

**Choose Front if you:**
- Need omnichannel support (SMS, social, chat, email)
- Have complex workflows & large teams
- Want built-in AI assistance
- Need advanced reporting

**Choose Help Scout if you:**
- Want simplicity & ease of use
- Have a tight budget
- Focus mainly on email/chat
- Prefer straightforward implementation

**Best for:** Front = enterprises; Help Scout = small-mid businesses
